name: logistics carriers processing 50–100 shipments/month tool
description: For logistics carriers processing 50–100 shipments/month, manual report generation causes late compliance submissions. We automate report generation instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in generating compliance reports from raw shipment logs.
features: Ability to import raw shipment logs

locked_fields.primary_problem: Difficulty in generating compliance reports from raw shipment logs.

must_have_features: Ability to import raw shipment logs
